creator: viper@perm.raid.ru
text:
The motivation of the update is this:
http://ftp.digium.com/pub/asa/ASA-2007-018.pdf
"Exhaustion vulnerability in IAX2 channel driver"

What makes this patch. 
1. Adds work with the port sqlite.
2. Adds support for faxes. 
3. Adds to build asterisk with the option IMAP STORAGE. 
4. A small patch patch-configure cleaning. Eliminated unnecessary lines after PR ports/114613 and ports/114612.
5. Upgrading to version 1.4.9

Fix: Apply patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
